signals.reasoning: Hold the live ETH long as a bounded-risk management position. Event veto is now CLEAR, ETH still sits in a broader trend-supported structure, and this is not the kind of damage that forces a cleanup exit by itself if the previously confirmed exchange-native stop/TP remain in place. The position is small, so management quality matters more than reacting to minor unrealized noise.
BTC remains constructive with trend-supported structure and negative funding underneath, but for this cycle it is context for the ETH management decision rather than a fresh trade to force.
SOL is still firm and trend-supported, but not enough cleaner than the live ETH long to justify shifting focus during position management.
TST is one of the stronger upside names on structure, but after a large extension it is better left as watch-only than chased while we already have ETH exposure on.
STBL has strong upside continuation but also clear crowding and positive funding, so it does not beat the bar for a fresh position-management rotation.
PEOPLE is constructive but still thin and incomplete mechanically, which keeps it watch-only instead of something to force over the live ETH hold.
MERL has recovered well, but it still lacks the depth and clarity needed to outrank the current ETH position.
GRIFFAIN remains deep in a long-liquidation flush with negative funding; it is too damaged to trust as a long and too extended to chase short.
BIO has improved, but the setup is still thin and incomplete enough that it stays watch-only.
LDO has one of the cleaner upside structures on the board, but it is already extended and still not a better management choice than simply holding the small ETH position.
FARTCOIN is participating in the rebound, but the structure is too noisy and too crowded to justify a fresh decision here.
